title: AGENTOBS TemplatePayload
description: RFC-0001 §7.2 — Payload for template registry lifecycle events in the llm.template.* namespace. Tracks the creation, publication, and variable binding of registered prompt templates across the prompt engineering lifecycle. Three event types: llm.template.registered (a new template or version was added to the registry), llm.template.variable.bound (a variable was bound to a template for a specific call), llm.template.validation.failed (a template validation check did not pass).

TemplateRegisteredPayload.title: TemplateRegisteredPayload
TemplateRegisteredPayload.description: Payload for llm.template.registered — a new prompt template or version was added to the template registry, making it available for rendering.

version.description: Version string for this template registration.

template_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the template content at the time of registration. Acts as a content fingerprint.

variable_names.description: All variable placeholders declared in this template.

variable_count.description: Total number of variables declared in the template.

language.description: Primary language of the template content (BCP-47 language tag).

char_count.description: Character length of the template before variable substitution.

is_active.description: Whether this version is the active (default) version for this template_id on registration.

tags.description: Optional metadata tags for the template (e.g. use_case, owner, model_family).

TemplateVariableBoundPayload.title: TemplateVariableBoundPayload
TemplateVariableBoundPayload.description: Payload for llm.template.variable.bound — a named variable was bound to a value for use in a specific template rendering. Variable values MUST NOT be stored if they are sensitive (§20.4); only the variable name and type metadata are recorded.

template_id.description: Unique identifier for the template being rendered.

version.description: Version of the template being rendered.

variable_name.description: Name of the variable being bound.

value_type.description: Data type of the bound value.

value_length.description: Character or element count of the bound value. For strings: character count. For arrays/objects: element count.

value_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the bound value (as canonical JSON for non-string types). Enables deduplication without storing the value.

is_sensitive.description: Whether this variable value was marked as sensitive and should not be logged.

span_id.description: Links this variable binding to the span that will consume it.

TemplateValidationFailedPayload.title: TemplateValidationFailedPayload
TemplateValidationFailedPayload.description: Payload for llm.template.validation.failed — a template could not be loaded or rendered due to validation errors.

template_id.description: Unique identifier for the template that failed validation.

version.description: Version of the template that failed validation.

failure_reason.description: Concise description of the validation failure. MUST NOT include raw template content or sensitive values.
examples: Template hash mismatch: registry value differs from stored content
Template version '2.1.0' not found in registry
